name: Sad Virus Winter
short_description: Second part of sad virus game series. Now mission to find beer bottles in winter themed maps and by collecting beer bottles level finished
detailed_description:
STORY:

Second part for third person walking adventure simulation game series. Again player control virus character whose mission is to collect and find beer bottles in 4 different winter themed levels. When player finds beer bottle level is finished and player get steam achievements. So can you make sad virus again happy for finding beer. Only mission is to hang at beautiful winter maps and find missing beer

FEATURES:

  • 4 different winter themed maps each containing 1 beer bottle. Finding bottle gives steam achievements

  • Steam Acheivements

  • Beautiful winter places
